[usage]> AI Tool Update Digest
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Claude Code

Updated to 2.1.183

2026-06-17 ~ 2026-06-19

  1. Settings are easier to keep

    Esc now saves and closes.

    Original
    Changed /config toggle behavior.

  2. Safer auto mode: blocks destructive commands

    Auto mode now blocks destructive commands first.

    Original
    Improved auto mode safety.
View update history

2.1.182 · 2026-06-10 ~ 2026-06-16

  1. The older settings panel is steadier

    Theme switching no longer flickers.

Codex

Updated to 0.141.0

2026-06-18

  1. Remote work keeps the remote machine's shell.

    Native directories and shells are preserved.

    Original
    Cross-platform remote execution now preserves executor-native working directories and shells, including filesystem permission paths across app-server and exec-server boundaries.
View update history

0.140.9 · 2026-06-12

  1. Remote sessions reconnect more reliably.

    Recovery is smoother after transient disconnects.

Antigravity

Updated to 1.0.10

2026-06-13 ~ 2026-06-19

  1. Built-in guides are one ask away.

    The antigravity_guide skill opens docs in context.

    Original
    Added antigravity_guide builtin skill to provide instant, in-context reference guides for the Antigravity 2.0, CLI, IDE, and SDK.
View update history

1.0.9 · 2026-06-06 ~ 2026-06-12

  1. Task drawer opens faster.

    Background task details render with less lag.

No cloud. No tracking. Just yours.
